name: Omon.chldiatos
title: Surface Mass Concentration of Diatoms Expressed as Chlorophyll in Sea Water
description: chlorophyll from diatom phytoplankton component concentration alone
processing note:
This is a regional subset of the variable. If you are producing the global equivalent of Omon.chldiatos, you should omit this regional South30 version. 
CHANGE SINCE CMIP6 in Dimensions - CMIP6:longitude latitude time CMIP7:longitude latitude time depth0m,
